title: Fable 5 is never coming back, here's why
summary: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and characterizes this as the beginning of a permanent underclass. The video discusses the consequences of this action within an open-source AI context.
writeup: David Ondrej argues that Fable 5 was banned and will not return. The video frames this removal as the start of a permanent technological underclass, treating the product's disappearance as a marker of broader access divisions rather than a one-off decision. The central takeaways are the claim of a ban and the prediction that no comeback is coming.
